packs.name: Speedflip Kickoff Test
packs.creator: Musty
packs.description: The definitive speedflip kickoff training pack. Practice flip-cancel kickoffs from multiple positions and test your consistency.

packs.name: Best Goals Recreated
packs.creator: Musty
packs.description: Recreate iconic Rocket League goals. High-intensity scenarios testing creativity and mechanical precision.

packs.name: Musty Preflip Test
packs.creator: Musty
packs.description: Preflip and redirect scenarios designed to push your mechanical creativity to the limit.

packs.name: Back Wall Air Dribbles
packs.creator: Musty
packs.description: Air dribble setups starting from the back wall. Build confidence taking the ball up the wall and across the pitch.

packs.name: Impossible Shot Challenge
packs.creator: Musty
packs.description: One extremely difficult shot that will test even SSL-level players. Can you make the impossible look easy?

packs.name: Sudden Aerials
packs.creator: Wayton Pilkin
packs.description: Fast aerial challenges with limited setup time. Mimics real-game pressure where you must react instantly.

packs.name: Beginner Dribble Training
packs.creator: Wayton Pilkin
packs.description: Fundamental dribbling and flick practice for new players. Focuses on ball control while moving across the field.

packs.name: Power Shots
packs.creator: Wayton Pilkin
packs.description: Long-range strike training to develop powerful, accurate shots. Focus on timing your dodge for maximum velocity.

packs.name: Angled Shots
packs.creator: Wayton Pilkin
packs.description: Shooting scenarios from awkward angles to improve goal-scoring from positions where you don't have a straight shot.

packs.name: Aerial Lv1
packs.creator: Wayton Pilkin
packs.description: Basic aerial practice with static ball positions. The perfect first pack for players learning to fly consistently.

packs.name: Ground Shots
packs.creator: Poquito
packs.description: 50 ground-level shots covering every common in-game scenario. Poquito's most popular pack for building shooting fundamentals.

packs.name: Aerials-Double Tap Setups
packs.creator: Poquito
packs.description: 50 shots focused on aerial setups into double taps. Learn to follow your own shot off the backboard for clean goals.

packs.name: Aerial Shots - Redirects
packs.creator: Poquito
packs.description: Redirect scenarios where you must adjust mid-air to score. Great for improving aerial adaptability.

packs.name: Wall Shots
packs.creator: Poquito
packs.description: 48 shots starting from the wall. Practice reading bounces off the wall and striking before the ball hits the ground.

packs.name: Clears-Backboard Reads
packs.creator: Poquito
packs.description: 44 defensive clears and backboard reads. Learn to clear with power and read bounces off your own backboard.

packs.name: Aerial Shots-Pass
packs.creator: Poquito
packs.description: Aerial shots off passes. Improve your ability to convert team plays with airborne strikes.

packs.name: A Complete Warm-Up X Spookluke
packs.creator: Poquito
packs.description: Comprehensive warm-up pack covering aerials, backboards, and awkward reads. Perfect before jumping into ranked.

packs.name: Saves
packs.creator: Poquito
packs.description: Goalie saves from various positions and speeds. Build your last-line-of-defense reactions.

packs.name: Dribbles
packs.creator: Poquito
packs.description: Basic dribble and flick setups on the ground. Learn to keep the ball on your hood and pop it past defenders.

packs.name: Aerial Shots - Rebound
packs.creator: Poquito
packs.description: Aerial shots following rebounds. Practice reading the ball after it hits the backboard.

packs.name: Clears
packs.creator: Poquito
packs.description: 48 powerful clear scenarios. Focus on sending the ball to safe zones under pressure.

packs.name: Breakaway Passes
packs.creator: Lethamyr
packs.description: Passing and shooting drills based on breakaway scenarios. Improve your transition from defense to offense.

packs.name: Redirect Mechanics Warmup
packs.creator: Lethamyr
packs.description: Redirect shot mechanics designed to warm you up. Multiple angles and speeds to dial in your reads.

packs.name: High Clear Defense 2/2
packs.creator: Lethamyr
packs.description: Defensive high clears from pressured positions. Learn to keep the ball out when opponents are crashing.

packs.name: Leading Backboard Shots
packs.creator: Lethamyr
packs.description: Advanced backboard shot setups where you lead the ball into the perfect rebound angle.

packs.name: Diamond-Champion Training
packs.creator: Thanovic
packs.description: Rank-specific training for Diamond through Champion players. All-around mechanical development.

packs.name: Bronze-Silver Training
packs.creator: Thanovic
packs.description: Beginner-friendly shots for Bronze and Silver players. Focus on consistency and basic mechanics.

packs.name: Gold-Platinum Training
packs.creator: Thanovic
packs.description: Core mechanics pack for Gold and Platinum players. Covers power shots, aerials, and basic defense.

packs.name: Champion - GC Training
packs.creator: Thanovic
packs.description: Fast-paced scenarios for Champion and Grand Champion players. Push your consistency under pressure.

packs.name: All Around Training
packs.creator: Thanovic
packs.description: Mixed aerial and shooting scenarios. Great for warming up multiple mechanics at once.

packs.name: Grand Champion
packs.creator: Thanovic
packs.description: Pro-level shots for Grand Champion players. High speed and mechanical complexity.

packs.name: The Ultimate Warmup
packs.creator: Gregan
packs.description: Gregan's signature warmup covering ground shots, aerials, and wall shots. A staple before ranked sessions.

packs.name: Self-Set Backboard Consistency
packs.creator: FlabbyNostril
packs.description: Master self-set backboard double taps. Multiple starting positions teach you to read and redirect your own shots.

packs.name: Redirect Consistency
packs.creator: FlabbyNostril
packs.description: Redirect scenarios to improve your ability to adjust mid-air and score from passes or clears.

packs.name: Clearing for Beans
packs.creator: JohnnyBoi_i
packs.description: Official RLCS7 featured pack by JohnnyBoi_i. Defensive clear scenarios with realistic pressure.

packs.name: Dribble Training
packs.creator: Virge
packs.description: Official RLCS7 featured dribbling pack. Covers ball control, flicks, and ground-based offense.

packs.name: Shooting Consistency
packs.creator: Wayprotein
packs.description: 20 varied shots from backboard rebounds to infield passes. A forgiving warm-up for all skill levels.

packs.name: Novice Defender
packs.creator: Wayprotein
packs.description: Official RLCS7 featured defensive pack for Gold players. Learn positioning and shadow defense basics.

packs.name: Shadow Saves
packs.creator: Wayprotein
packs.description: Shadow defense and save scenarios for Platinum players. Improve your last-man-back positioning and reactions.

packs.name: Shots You Shouldn't Miss
packs.creator: Fickle Platypus
packs.description: 10 first-time shot scenarios under time pressure. No bounces allowed — pure striking consistency.

packs.name: Backboard Shots
packs.creator: Lachinio
packs.description: Official RLCS7 featured pack. Backboard rebound shots at Champion-level difficulty.

packs.name: Recreating RLCS7
packs.creator: Mertzy
packs.description: Official RLCS7 featured pack. Recreate iconic shots from the RLCS Season 7 Championship.

packs.name: Treino De Walldrag
packs.creator: Majowww
packs.description: Official RLCS7 featured pack. Wall drag and wall-shot training at Champion difficulty.

packs.name: Pass Training
packs.creator: FLuuMP
packs.description: Official RLCS7 featured passing pack. Practice receiving passes and converting them into goals.

packs.name: Self Double Touch: Pro
packs.creator: Plasmid
packs.description: Official RLCS7 featured double-touch pack. Diamond-level backboard self-setups into redirects.

packs.name: Backboard Therapy
packs.creator: Wayprotein
packs.description: Relaxing backboard read scenarios with generous setup time. Perfect for drilling aerial redirects.

packs.name: Double Tap Playground
packs.creator: Wayprotein
packs.description: 50 double tap scenarios for Grand Champion players. Comprehensive backboard and redirect training.

packs.name: Dribble Flick Playground
packs.creator: Wayprotein
packs.description: 16 dribble and flick setups for Platinum players. Practice close-control offense and deceptive flicks.

packs.name: Wall Shot Mastery
packs.creator: Wayprotein
packs.description: 30 wall-shot scenarios for Platinum players. Learn to strike accurately after driving up the wall.

packs.name: Basic Backboard Double Taps/Passes
packs.creator: Wayprotein
packs.description: 12 basic double-tap and pass setups from a grounded start. Recommended for learning backboard reads.

packs.name: General Control Training
packs.creator: Thanovic
packs.description: Car and ball control drills for Diamond players. Focus on aerial adjustments and recovery.
